/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Yonder.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Yonder.dir/yonder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Yonder.dir/civ.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Yonder.dir/tile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Yonder.dir/resource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Yonder.dir/globals.cpp.o -o Yonder  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-graphics.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-window.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-system.3.0.2.dylib
